'''鈭歯g-th-b''' ('''ngathaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neosynthesize|neosynthesize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neosynthesize|neosynthesize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-th-b
|-
! Lemma
| ngathaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathabithi|ngathabithi]] || [[word:ngathabiji|ngathabiji]] || [[word:ngathabishi|ngathabishi]] || [[word:ngathabi|ngathabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathabuthuth|ngathabuthuth]] || [[word:ngathabujuj|ngathabujuj]] || [[word:ngathabushush|ngathabushush]] || [[word:ngathab|ngathab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathabuthu|ngathabuthu]] || [[word:ngathabuju|ngathabuju]] || [[word:ngathabushu|ngathabushu]] || [[word:ngathabu|ngathabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathabufuth|ngathabufuth]] || [[word:ngathabufuj|ngathabufuj]] || [[word:ngathabufush|ngathabufush]] || [[word:ngathabuf|ngathabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathabethe|ngathabethe]] || [[word:ngathabeje|ngathabeje]] || [[word:ngathabeshe|ngathabeshe]] || [[word:ngathabe|ngathabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathabothoth|ngathabothoth]] || [[word:ngathabojoj|ngathabojoj]] || [[word:ngathaboshosh|ngathaboshosh]] || [[word:ngathab|ngathab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathabotho|ngathabotho]] || [[word:ngathabojo|ngathabojo]] || [[word:ngathabosho|ngathabosho]] || [[word:ngathabo|ngathabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathabofoth|ngathabofoth]] || [[word:ngathabofoj|ngathabofoj]] || [[word:ngathabofosh|ngathabofosh]] || [[word:ngathabof|ngathabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngathab忙th忙|ngathab忙th忙]] || [[word:ngathab忙j忙|ngathab忙j忙]] || [[word:ngathab忙sh忙|ngathab忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngathab忙|ngathab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathabathath|ngathabathath]] || [[word:ngathabajaj|ngathabajaj]] || [[word:ngathabashash|ngathabashash]] || [[word:ngathab|ngathab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathabatha|ngathabatha]] || [[word:ngathabaja|ngathabaja]] || [[word:ngathabasha|ngathabasha]] || [[word:ngathaba|ngathaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathabafath|ngathabafath]] || [[word:ngathabafaj|ngathabafaj]] || [[word:ngathabafash|ngathabafash]] || [[word:ngathabaf|ngathabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngathabasha|ngathabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongathabasha|gongathabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingathabasha|gokingathabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngathabn眉sha|ngathabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongathabnkn眉sha|gongathabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingathabn眉sha|gokingathabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngathabsh毛sha|ngathabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongathabnksh毛sha|gongathabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingathabsh毛sha|gokingathabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathabrosha|ngathabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathabnkrosha|gongathabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathabrosha|gokingathabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathabmusha|ngathabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathabnkmusha|gongathabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathabmusha|gokingathabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngathabsherasha|ngathabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongathabnksherasha|gongathabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingathabsherasha|gokingathabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngathabngasha|ngathabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongathabnkngasha|gongathabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingathabngasha|gokingathabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngathabyasha|ngathabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongathabnkyasha|gongathabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingathabyasha|gokingathabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngathabyamasha|ngathabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongathabnkyamasha|gongathabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingathabyamasha|gokingathabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathabn眉sh毛sha|ngathabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathabnkn眉sh毛sha|gongathabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathabn眉sh毛sha|gokingathabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathabn眉rosha|ngathabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathabnkn眉rosha|gongathabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathabn眉rosha|gokingathabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathabn眉musha|ngathabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathabnkn眉musha|gongathabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathabn眉musha|gokingathabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathabsh毛n眉sha|ngathabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathabnksh毛n眉sha|gongathabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathabsh毛n眉sha|gokingathabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathabsh毛rosha|ngathabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathabnksh毛rosha|gongathabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathabsh毛rosha|gokingathabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathabsh毛musha|ngathabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathabnksh毛musha|gongathabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathabsh毛musha|gokingathabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathabron眉sha|ngathabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathabnkron眉sha|gongathabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathabron眉sha|gokingathabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathabrosh毛sha|ngathabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathabnkrosh毛sha|gongathabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathabrosh毛sha|gokingathabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngathabromusha|ngathabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongathabnkromusha|gongathabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingathabromusha|gokingathabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngathabmun眉sha|ngathabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongathabnkmun眉sha|gongathabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingathabmun眉sha|gokingathabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngathabmush毛sha|ngathabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongathabnkmush毛sha|gongathabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingathabmush毛sha|gokingathabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngathabmurosha|ngathabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongathabnkmurosha|gongathabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingathabmurosha|gokingathabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngathab|ngathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙th忙b|ng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongathab|hongathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙th忙b|hong忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongathab|hohongathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙th忙b|hohong忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngathab|n眉ngathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙th忙b|n眉ng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngathab|n眉n眉ngathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙th忙b|n眉n眉ng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngathab|n茂ngathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙th忙b|n茂ng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngathab|n茂n茂ngathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙th忙b|n茂n茂ng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungathab|lungathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙th忙b|lung忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungathab|lulungathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙th忙b|lulung忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingathab|lingathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙th忙b|ling忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingathab|lilingathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙th忙b|liling忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongathab|kongathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙th忙b|kong忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongathab|kokongathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙th忙b|kokong忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengathab|kengathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙th忙b|keng忙th忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengathab|kekengathab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙th忙b|kekeng忙th忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
